items.title: Nuwan Thusara withdraws lawsuit against Sri Lanka Cricket
items.summary: Nuwan Thushara is yet to join RCB at IPL 2026 but the team hasn't named a replacement for him yet
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: Forrest signs on for 18th season at Celtic
items.summary: James Forrest agrees a new deal at Celtic, keeping the club's most decorated player on until the end of next season.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Knight Riders home base to host Olympic cricket: ICC CEO
items.summary: Sanjog Gupta was speaking at the ground breaking ceremony of the venue for the Los Angeles 2028 Olympics.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
